hook.summary: A satisfying sequence of colorful marbles rolling through a magical forest.
hook.visual_action: A line of marbles with different colors and symbols snakes across the screen in a curved path.

scene_flow: Marbles emerge from the left side and follow a curved path through a lush forest.
The line of marbles grows, filling the screen with vibrant colors and intricate symbols.
A hand icon repeatedly clicks the 'PLAY NOW' button at the bottom of the screen.
The marble sequence loops continuously against the fantasy-themed backdrop.
audience_proxy: Casual puzzle game players who enjoy marble-shooter mechanics and vibrant, fantasy-themed aesthetics.
